title: Keel Toys Pipp Scottish Piper Bear Soft Plush Souvenir
features: Features: Attention to detail and expressive eyes ensure you simply want to pick up and hug a souvenir toy
Ranges: Ranges include UK, London, Scotland and Welsh Souvenirs
Fabric: Manufactured from acrylic fabrics. The toy is filled with rPet recycled polyester made from plastic waste. Hand washable
Safety: British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71.
Design: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card
